hooks.command: bash -c '[ "$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "main" ] || { echo "{\"block\": true, \"message\": \"Cannot edit files on main branch. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feature/your-feature\"}" >&2; exit 2; }'

bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in *.py) "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/venv/bin/ruff" format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 && echo "{\"feedback\": \"Formatted with Ruff.\", \"suppressOutput\": true}" || echo "{\"feedback\": \"Ruff format failed.\"}" >&2 ;; esac'

bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in *.py) output=$("$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/venv/bin/ruff" check "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1); if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then echo "{\"feedback\": \"Ruff check passed.\", \"suppressOutput\": true}"; else echo "$output" | head -20 >&2; echo "{\"feedback\": \"Ruff found lint issues.\"}" >&2; fi; exit 0 ;; esac'

bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */test_*.py|*_test.py|*/tests/*.py) echo "{\"feedback\": \"Running tests...\"}" >&2; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/venv/bin/pytest" "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -30; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 ]; then echo "{\"feedback\": \"Tests passed.\"}"; else echo "{\"feedback\": \"Tests failed. See output above.\"}" >&2; fi ;; esac'
